message:
fix(lint): remove unused params in stopAllCrew and runScorekeeperWithStore

Remove unused `force` param from stopAllCrew and unused `townRoot` param
from runScorekeeperWithStore. These were causing unparam lint failures
blocking all CI across open PRs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
